calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Case For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Saerim Luciano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION,
No appearance by defaulted defendant DONNISHA TUCKER,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Ryan Alexander sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $36,395.85
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2945.57
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $517.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $39,858.42

Judgment signed in open court.
